title: University of Southampton Delhi Announces Gurgaon Campus Location
text: University of Southampton Delhi announces Gurgaon’s International Tech Park as its campus in India. The announcement was made on 12 December 2024. Further details can be found in an article at the Indian Express.
summary: University of Southampton Delhi's new campus in India is announced for Gurgaon’s International Tech Park, effective December 12, 2024. Read more at the Indian Express.
